category.title: Category
category.description: Order, Shipping, Returns, Refund, Product, Billing, Account, or Escalation.

chatSummary.title: Chat Summary
chatSummary.description: ALWAYS pass this. A faithful, detailed summary/transcript of the ENTIRE conversation so far — what the shopper said, what you looked up, and what you did — so the case carries the chat transcript for the human who picks it up.

escalate.title: Escalate
escalate.description: True to escalate to a human agent.

orderIdentifier.title: Order Identifier
orderIdentifier.description: Related order number or Woo id, if any.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: A short title for the issue.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass loggedInEmail when signed in, or the email verified by OTP. If blank, the case is created as an unlinked guest case.
